chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 808 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 05.03.2025 Petitioner Dr. Karar Hussain present in person Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Nazir Ahmed Junejo, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.4 to 6, which are taken on record. Petitioner present in person submits that he would be satisfied and will not press this petition, if the learned Special Judge, Anti-Corruption (Provincial) Sukkur Camp at Shaheed Benazirabad is directed to pass an appropriate order on his Direct Complaint, which is pending adjudication. Such proposal of the petitioner has not been opposed by learned Assistant AG and Counsel for the respondents No.4 to 6. Accordingly, instant Constitutional Petition is disposed of with direction to learned Special Judge Anti-Corruption, Sukkur Camp at Shaheed Benazirabad to pass an appropriate order on the Direct Complaint of the petitioner within 15 (fifteen) after receipt of this order. Judge Judge ARBROHI
